compiled_state.title: UPDATE test: ticket-reducer PRECONDITIONS summary field + legacy 'pre-manifest' placeholder
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Story
0263-62ba — Migrate 4 consumers to PRECONDITIONS, add compaction on epic-closure with ordering contract

## Objective
Update existing ticket-list and ticket-show tests to assert the new `preconditions_summary` field that will appear in the reduced ticket JSON. Also assert legacy tickets (zero PRECONDITIONS events) render with a "pre-manifest" placeholder value. Tests must fail RED before the reducer is updated.

## Existing Test Files to Modify
- `tests/scripts/test-ticket-list.sh` — add test_ticket_list_preconditions_summary_field
- `tests/scripts/test-ticket-show.sh` — add test_ticket_show_preconditions_summary_legacy_placeholder

## .test-index RED markers required
- `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-reducer.py: tests/scripts/test-ticket-list.sh [test_ticket_list_preconditions_summary_field]`
- `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-reducer.py: tests/scripts/test-ticket-show.sh [test_ticket_show_preconditions_summary_legacy_placeholder]`

## Test Approach (Given/When/Then)

**test_ticket_list_preconditions_summary_field:**
- Given: a temp ticket dir containing a ticket with 2 PRECONDITIONS events (one minimal, one standard)
- When: `ticket-list.sh` is run (TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR pointing to temp dir)
- Then: the output JSON array contains a ticket object with `preconditions_summary` field; field is non-null and contains at least `manifest_depth` key

**test_ticket_show_preconditions_summary_legacy_placeholder:**
- Given: a temp ticket dir containing a legacy ticket (no PRECONDITIONS events — zero PRECONDITIONS files)
- When: `ticket-show.sh <ticket_id>` is run
- Then: the output JSON contains `preconditions_summary: {"status": "pre-manifest"}` (or equivalent placeholder); exit 0; no error output

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `test_ticket_list_preconditions_summary_field` test function added to test-ticket-list.sh
  Verify: grep -q "test_ticket_list_preconditions_summary_field" tests/scripts/test-ticket-list.sh
- [ ] `test_ticket_show_preconditions_summary_legacy_placeholder` test function added to test-ticket-show.sh
  Verify: grep -q "test_ticket_show_preconditions_summary_legacy_placeholder" tests/scripts/test-ticket-show.sh
- [ ] Both new tests fail RED (reducer not yet updated)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-list.sh test_ticket_list_preconditions_summary_field 2>&1 | grep -qiE "FAIL|error|not found"
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED markers for both tests
  Verify: grep -c '\[test_ticket_list_preconditions_summary_field\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Existing ticket-list and ticket-show tests still pass (no regression)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-list.sh 2>&1 | grep -E "^(PASS|FAIL)" | grep -v "test_ticket_list_preconditions_summary_field" | grep -c "FAIL" | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
